particulars.description: The part of the freehold land being 100 north drive, hounslow TW3 1PU (title for which is registered at hmlr with title absolute under title number MX408893) shown edged red on the plan attached to the TR5 dated 13 march 2024 made between north drive developments limited (1) and the chargor (2). and the part of the freehold land being 83 north drive, hounslow TW3 1PT (title for which is registered at hmlr with title absolute under title number MX108240) shown edged red on the plan attached to the TR5 dated 13 march 2024 made between north drive developments limited (1) and the chargor (2).
